description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for page-level traffic analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Unified page path or screen name across web and app (e.g. /products/cashews). The primary page identifier.
Traffic source that first acquired the user visiting this page (e.g. (direct) / google / facebook).
Campaign name under which the user visiting this page was first acquired.
Numeric ID of the campaign under which the user was first acquired.
Marketing medium that first acquired the user (e.g. none / cpc / organic).
Human-readable screen or page title (e.g. Natural Air Roasted Jumbo Green Chili Cashews). The display name of the page.
Number of completed ecommerce transactions from users who visited this page.
Fraction of sessions that were not engaged on this page (0.0–1.0).
Number of engaged sessions that included this page.
Average session duration in seconds for sessions visiting this page.
Total users (new + returning) who visited this page.
Number of active users who visited this page.
Number of first-time users who visited this page.
Total number of sessions that included this page.
Total number of times this page was viewed (including repeat views in same session).
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
